_authoring_notes: Velocity Section 4 — Charter Member Offer gold callout. Analog to LLSS Section 4 'Next Summit'.
Cloned from LLSS 04-next-summit.json structure on 2026-04-27. Same .fsi-callout-gold class.
Offer is a Velocity-2026-only deal: first 100 new Five Star Alliance members at $300/yr locked + 20% off all FSI events. Standard rate $495/yr.
Primary CTA links to Velocity registration (Charter enrollment is an add-on during checkout). Secondary link explains membership.

settings.html:
Velocity 2026 Only

Charter Member Offer

The first 100 new Five Star Alliance members who join at Velocity receive:

$300 per year, locked for the life of membership

Plus 20% off all FSI events permanently.

Once 100 spots are filled, the standard Alliance rate of $495 per year applies. Charter Members receive a permanent Charter Member designation in the FSI RE community directory. Charter Member enrollment is available as an add-on during Velocity registration.

Register for Velocity 2026
Learn more about membership →
